en.text: , by: Heb. by the hand of governor: or, captain
for you, O ye, to dwell
. Consider: Heb. Set your heart on your ways
, but ye are not filled with drink
you, but there is none warm
to put it into a bag
. Consider: Heb. Set your heart on your ways
in it, and I will be glorified
, and, lo, it came to little
, and upon that which the ground
, by: Heb. by the hand of
it now? is it not in your eyes
: for I am with you, saith
any of these, shall it be unclean
And now, I pray you, consider
Since those days were, when one came
; yet ye turned not to me, saith
